# WI-QUIC-INT-0007 - QUIC Local Harness Preflight Planning and Localhost Smoke Work Item

## Summary

Extract a small preflight planner from the interop harness and add direct localhost smoke tests so harness setup issues can be isolated without the external runner.

## Requirements Addressed

- REQ-QUIC-INT-0014

## Design Inputs

- ARC-QUIC-INT-0007

## Planned Changes

- Add `InteropHarnessPreflightPlanner` to centralize request parsing, qlog selection, endpoint resolution, transfer-path mapping, and the supported client/server option builders.
- Update `InteropHarnessRunner` to consume the planner while keeping the QUIC execution flow unchanged.
- Add a new requirement-home test file that validates planner decisions and runs direct in-process localhost handshake, retry, and transfer smoke tests with matching certificate material.
- Keep `127.0.0.1` certificate-name failures honest and avoid any change to the external runner repository.

## Out of Scope

- external `quic-interop-runner` registry changes
- hostname or certificate-validation weakening
- transport/runtime protocol changes
- benchmark work
- fuzzing work

## Verification Plan

Run the new requirement-home test file with a narrow `REQ_QUIC_INT_0014` filter, confirm the planner-level decisions are testable on their own, and inspect the localhost smoke outputs plus qlog artifacts. Re-run once if the tree is temporarily mid-edit and a first pass fails for an unrelated build reason.

## Completion Notes

The preflight planner and localhost smoke lane are implemented, and the requirement-home test lane passed under the narrow REQ_QUIC_INT_0014 filter on 2026-04-14.
